combo_product_system.pick: Pick to show two whole models side by side under one title. Composed asset (013+024), recolored teal/coral.

solid3d_bluegreen_003.pick: Pick for a central concept feeding several parts (hub-and-spoke) (~4-8 satellites, each holds short-label); full-slide, in a dimensional/3D-styled deck; recolor the base hexes to the deck palette. Skip if a flat/minimalist deck (use the SVG framework template) or the content is not a relationship structure.

solid3d_bluegreen_004.pick: Pick for bottom-wide hierarchical tiers (~3-5 tiers, each holds short-label); full-slide, in a dimensional/3D-styled deck; recolor the base hexes to the deck palette. Skip if a flat/minimalist deck (use the SVG pyramid template) or the content is not a hierarchy structure.
